metadata.name: 05_终极大乱斗综合测试
metadata.description: 涵盖人工审批、生图、条件路由等高级节点的全链路压测模板

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": -200, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["theme"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_human", "type": "human_input", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"approvalMessage": "是否允许开始创作关于：{theme} 的内容？"}}, "label": "人工确认主题"}, {"id": "node_switch", "type": "switch", "position": {"x": 400, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"variable": "difficulty", "cases": [{"value": "easy", "targetRoute": "node_llm_easy"}, {"value": "hard", "targetRoute": "node_llm_hard"}]}}, "label": "路由分发"}, {"id": "node_llm_easy", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 700, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "主题：{theme}\\n写个简单的故事。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "story_text"}}, "label": "生成简单文本"}, {"id": "node_llm_hard", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 1000, "y": 450}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "主题：{theme}\\n生成一个详细的结构 JSON，包含 scenes 数组。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "complex_structure"}}, "label": "生成复杂结构"}, {"id": "node_image", "type": "image_generator", "position": {"x": 1000, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "dall-e-3", "promptTemplate": "为这个故事配图：{story_text}", "outputVariable": "image_url"}}, "label": "生图节点"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 1300, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "finished", "type": "string", "value": "true", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_human", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_human", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_human_node_switch", "type": "default", "source": "node_human", "target": "node_switch", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_switch_node_llm_easy_case_0", "type": "default", "source": "node_switch", "target": "node_llm_easy", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "case_0"}, {"id": "edge_node_switch_node_llm_hard_case_1", "type": "default", "source": "node_switch", "target": "node_llm_hard", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "case_1"}, {"id": "edge_node_llm_easy_node_image", "type": "edge_node_image_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_image", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_llm_hard_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_llm_hard", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["theme"]}}, {"id": "node_human", "type": "human_input", "name": "人工确认主题", "config": {"approvalMessage": "是否允许开始创作关于：{theme} 的内容？"}}, {"id": "node_switch", "type": "switch", "name": "路由分发", "config": {"variable": "difficulty", "cases": [{"value": "easy", "targetRoute":
